root.name: Add Traditional Weapons Slide After Slide 4
root.description: Evaluates whether the agent successfully added a new slide with title 'Traditional Weapons' after slide 4 in the Pre-Colonial Filipino Culture presentation

children.name: Slide Addition
children.description: Verifies that a new slide was added to the presentation

children.name: New Slide Exists
children.description: Checks if exactly one new slide was added to the presentation

children.name: Slide Position
children.description: Verifies that the new slide was added after slide 4 (i.e., at position 5)

children.name: Slide Content
children.description: Evaluates the content of the newly added slide

children.name: Slide Title
children.description: Verifies that the new slide has the correct title 'Traditional Weapons'

children.name: Content Appropriateness
children.description: Evaluates if the slide content is appropriate for the presentation context (Pre-Colonial Filipino Culture)

children.name: No Extraneous Changes
children.description: Ensures that no unintended modifications were made to existing slides or presentation structure

children.name: No Slide Modifications
children.description: Verifies that existing slides were not modified

children.name: No Slide Removals
children.description: Ensures no existing slides were removed

children.name: No Animation Changes
children.description: Ensures no animations were added, removed, or modified

children.name: No Transition Changes
children.description: Ensures no slide transitions were added, removed, or modified

metadata.task: Add a new slide after slide 4 with the title 'Traditional Weapons'. For context, the presentation is about Pre-Colonial Filipino Culture.
